records.ety: [LL. arendator, arrendator, fr. arendare, arrendare, to pay rent, fr. arenda yearly rent; ad + renda, F. rente, E. rent. Cf. Arrentation and Rent.]

defs: In some provinces of Russia, one who farms the rents or revenues.
notes: ☞ A person who rents an estate belonging to the crown is called crown arendator.
